title: Oversized Hoodie Blanket Sherpa Hooded Sweatshirt Top Large Soft Plush, Blush Pink
features: Adore-ably soft hoodie blanket with cosy sherpa lining. Ideal for snuggling up while lounging
Comes in 2 great colours to quit differing tastes with white sherpa lining on the inside
One size fits all! Generous sizing with 78" waist, 38" Length and 34" Arm Length. Arms have elasticated cuff for perfect fitting
Made from a super soft coral fleece exterior and cosy sherpa lining. Sherpa lining is in the hood and front pocket. This makes it super soft to the touch and keeps you toasty warm.
description: Product Description Adore-ably soft Made to our exacting specification to be extra cosy. We have ensured our cosy hoodies are that extra bit bigger so you can wrap up warm in a soft cloud of sherpa cosiness Great Size Our 5ft 9" model loved this hoodie so much she jumped inside it. Here she is with her knees tucked all the way in Soft Lining Some other hoodies just line the edges. The Adore Home hoodie is lined all over! We even include it in the pockets so your hands don't miss out! Soft Sherpa Soft and cosy sherpa lining to ensure the Adore Home hoodie is super warm and great for snuggling in
